title: `ebed #5650
definition:
1) slave, servant
    1a) slave, servant, man-servant
    1b) subjects
    1c) servants, worshippers (of God)
    1d) servant (in special sense as prophets, Levites etc)
    1e) servant (of Israel)
    1f) servant (as form of address between equals)
